output.content:

1. [AMC Northbrook 14](https://www.fandango.com/arlington-heights_il_movietimes) - Why: AMC Northbrook 14 appears in a source section for movie theaters near Arlington Heights, IL.
2. [AMC Randhurst 12](https://www.fandango.com/arlington-heights_il_movietimes) - Why: AMC Randhurst 12 appears in a source section for movie theaters near Arlington Heights, IL.
3. [AMC South Barrington 24](https://www.fandango.com/arlington-heights_il_movietimes) - Why: AMC South Barrington 24 appears in a source section for movie theaters near Arlington Heights, IL.

The answer must list actual named entities of the requested subject when live evidence supports them. results.title: TOP 10 BEST Movie Theaters in Arlington Heights , IL - Yelp
results.snippet: "This is one of my top 3 movie theaters- period. It's a unique theater in that in addition to movies, they have a nice bar, bag toss, pool tables, and a fun ambiance.
